title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to Systems Engineering: Definition and Scope, Systems
Engineering Life Cycle, Key Concepts and Principles
Systems Engineering Processes: Requirements Engineering, Functional
Analysis and Allocation, System Architecture and Design
System Modeling and Simulation: Introduction to System Modeling, Tools
and Techniques for Modeling

title: Module 2
content:
System Integration Concepts :Definition and Importance of Integration,
Levels of System Integration, Integration Strategies and Approaches
Integration Processes and Techniques :Interface Management, Integration
Testing ,Verification and Validation
Challenges in System Integration: Interoperability Issues, Managing
Complexity, Risk Management in Integration

title: Module 3
content:
Design and Integration of Cyber-Physical Systems:
System Design Methodologies: Model-Based Systems Engineering
(MBSE), System Modeling and Simulation
Integration of CPS: Sensor and Actuator Integration,Real-Time Systems
and Embedded Computing, Networking and Communication Protocols
Challenges in CPS Integration: Interoperability and Standards, Security
and Privacy ,Scalability and Performance

title: Module 4
content:
Advanced Topics in Systems Engineering:
Systems of Systems (SoS): Definition and Characteristics, SoS Engineering
Challenges, SoS Architectures and Design
Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS): Introduction to CPS, CPS Architecture and
Integration, Security and Privacy in CPS
Emerging Trends in Systems Engineering: Model-Based Systems
Engineering (MBSE), Agile Systems Engineering, Digital Twins
